issue_summary: Most of Wolf Siberski's patch to fix /: MulitSearcher failed on WildcardQuery etc. this has not been committed: removal of mergeBooleanQueries(); change to BooleanQuery.equals() added: a test case that is commented out which shows strange queries like "multi* multi* foo" don't work properly
javadoc_before:
/** Expert: called when re-writing queries under MultiSearcher. * *

Only implemented by derived queries, with no * {@link #createWeight(Searcher)} implementation. */
javadoc_after:
/** Expert: called when re-writing queries under MultiSearcher.
   *
   * Create a single query suitable for use by all subsearchers (in 1-1
   * correspondence with queries). This is an optimization of the OR of
   * all queries. We handle the common optimization cases of equal
   * queries and overlapping clauses of boolean OR queries (as generated
   * by MultiTermQuery.rewrite() and RangeQuery.rewrite()).
   * Be careful overriding this method as queries[0] determines which
   * method will be called and is not necessarily of the same type as
   * the other queries.
  */
